title: IATA releases 2024 safety report
abstractNote: Annual safety performance report. All-accident rate: 1.13 per million flights (2024), one accident per 880,000 flights. Five-year average (2020-2024): one accident per 810,000 flights, improved from one per 456,000 flights (2011-2015). IOSA carriers: 0.92 per million flights vs. 1.70 for non-IOSA.

title: Aircraft and avionics equipment mechanics and technicians
abstractNote: Employment: 139,400 aircraft mechanics and service technicians (2024), 21,400 avionics technicians. Projected growth: 5% from 2024 to 2034 (faster than average). Projected annual openings: 13,100. Median annual wage: $78,680 (May 2024).

title: 2026 global fleet and MRO market assessment
abstractNote: U.S. MRO industry: $78.2 billion annual revenue, approximately 4,000 companies, 192,000 employees. American technicians produce 57% more revenue per capita than overseas counterparts. Worldwide: more than 5,000 companies employing nearly 430,000 people.

title: Global fleet and MRO market forecast 2025-2035
abstractNote: Global MRO market projected at $119 billion (2025), surpassing 2019 record by 12%. Projected to reach $156 billion by 2035 (2.7% CAGR). North America: $28 billion (2025), $34 billion (2035). Global fleet: 29,079 aircraft (2025) to 38,309 (2035), 32% increase.
